name: Momento (Serverless Cache & Pub/Sub)
pricing_notes: Free: 5GB/mo transfer + 50GB storage. Pay-as-you-go after: $0.15/GB transfer

auth.notes: Momento Auth Token (fine-grained scope: cache name, read/write/admin)

performance.notes: Sub-millisecond p50 in same region; 2-5ms typical; globally distributed

agent_readiness.notes: Serverless Redis alternative with no infrastructure. CacheClient.get/set/delete. Topics (pub/sub) for real-time events. Leaderboards. No connection management, no cluster config. SDK for Node.js, Python, Go, Java, .NET, Rust. Works in serverless functions, edge runtimes. Fine-grained auth tokens (cache-scoped). HTTP API for edge runtimes without SDK support. By ex-Amazon ElastiCache team. 30-day free trial, then generous free tier.

gotchas: No Redis protocol compatibility (can't use redis-cli or redis libraries)
Limited data structures vs Redis (no sorted sets, streams)
best_when: Serverless or edge functions needing cache without connection management
Vercel/Netlify/Cloudflare Workers needing cache (HTTP API available)
Teams wanting cache-as-a-service without Redis cluster ops
Real-time pub/sub without managing Redis Pub/Sub
avoid_when: Need Redis data structures (sorted sets, streams, HyperLogLog)
High-throughput applications where per-request cost matters
summary: Momento is a serverless cache and pub/sub service with no infrastructure management. CacheClient.get/set, Topics for pub/sub. Works in serverless and edge runtimes via HTTP API. Fine-grained auth tokens. By ex-Amazon ElastiCache team. No Redis protocol but simpler than managing Redis. Best for serverless/edge apps needing cache without connection pool management. Upstash for Redis protocol compatibility.
